pi_items.metadata_value: South Station ↔ Downtown Crossing ↔ Park Street
pi_items.verified_value: Red Line: Park Street → Downtown Crossing → South Station (in sequence)

privileged_info_summary: The task is based on the real Boston MBTA downtown subway network with authentic station names and official line colors. All seven stations (Park Street, Downtown Crossing, State, Government Center, Haymarket, North Station, South Station) are real MBTA stations serving the specified lines. The official hex color codes are verified: Red #DA291C, Orange #ED8B00, Blue #003DA5, Green #00843D. The specified station connections accurately reflect the actual MBTA topology: Red Line connects South Station-Downtown Crossing-Park Street; Orange Line connects Downtown Crossing-State-Haymarket-North Station; Blue Line connects Government Center-State; Green Line connects Park Street-Government Center-Haymarket-North Station via the historic Tremont Street subway tunnel.
